Container.Name: PrusaSlicer-noVNC
Container.Overview: PrusaSlicer running in your browser via noVNC. Fork of helfrichmichael/prusaslicer-novnc with Intel Arc GPU support.

Config.Name: noVNC Web Port
Config.Description: Port to access PrusaSlicer in the browser via noVNC.

Config.Name: Configs
Config.Description: Persistent storage for PrusaSlicer configuration and profiles.

Config.Name: Prints Output
Config.Description: Optional. Where G-code files are saved. Leave blank to keep files inside the container — this is fine if you use Prusa Connect to send prints directly to your printer. Map to an Unraid share (e.g. /mnt/user/3dprinting/prints) if you need network access to exported G-code.

Config.Name: Models
Config.Description: Optional. Where STL/3MF model files are stored. Leave blank to keep files inside the container — the built-in Printables browser works without this. Map to an Unraid share (e.g. /mnt/user/3dprinting/models) if you want to drop files from other machines.

Config.Name: GPU Device
Config.Description: Intel GPU device passthrough. Requires the Intel GPU plugin. Leave blank to disable GPU passthrough.

Config.Name: Enable HW GPU Acceleration
Config.Description: Set to true to enable VirtualGL GPU acceleration via the passed-in GPU device. Requires GPU Device to be set.

Config.Name: GPU Vendor
Config.Description: GPU driver stack to use when ENABLEHWGPU is true. intel: Intel Arc/Gen9+ via /dev/dri/ (default). amd: AMD via /dev/dri/. nvidia: NVIDIA via NVIDIA Container Toolkit — set NVIDIA_VISIBLE_DEVICES below and remove the GPU Device field.

Config.Name: VNC Resolution
Config.Description: Resolution of the virtual desktop (e.g. 1280x800, 1920x1080). Lower values keep windows on-screen before the browser resizes the display.

Config.Name: VNC Password
Config.Description: Optional password to protect the VNC session. Leave blank for no password.

Config.Name: NVIDIA Visible Devices
Config.Description: NVIDIA only: set to 'all' or a specific GPU UUID to pass through an NVIDIA GPU. Requires the Unraid NVIDIA plugin. Leave blank for Intel/AMD.

Config.Name: VGL Display
Config.Description: VirtualGL display backend. Use 'egl' for Intel/Mesa GPU passthrough.

Config.Name: VA-API Driver
Config.Description: Intel VA-API driver name. Use 'iHD' for Intel Arc/Gen9+ (recommended). Use 'i965' for older Intel GPUs.

Config.Name: Display
Config.Description: X display number. Do not change unless you know what you are doing.

Config.Name: Supervisor Log Level
Config.Description: Log verbosity for supervisord. Options: TRACE, DEBUG, INFO, WARN, ERROR, CRITICAL.
